The studio

One photographer. One crew. No outsourcing.

Surya Photography is run by Surya, based in Tamil Nadu, shooting weddings and events across the state and beyond. Every wedding is shot personally — no handing your day off to a junior you've never met.

The approach is candid-first: posed portraits where they matter, and a camera that mostly disappears into the background everywhere else. Film-inspired color, minimal over-editing, and a delivery timeline you don't have to chase.

50+Events covered
4.9★Client rating
2Shooters on every wedding
Portfolio

Recent work

A mix of weddings, engagements and events — filterable by type. Click any frame to view it larger.

Packages

Coverage that fits the day

Every package includes edited high-resolution images and an online gallery. Custom packages available on request.

Engagement Shoot

A relaxed, half-day session at a location of your choice. Great as a standalone, or as a warm-up before the big day.

Half day · 1 photographer · 60 edited photos

Wedding Day

Full-day coverage from getting-ready through the reception, with two shooters so nothing important is missed.

Full day · 2 photographers · full gallery

Multi-Day Wedding

Coverage across haldi, sangeet, ceremony and reception — for weddings that span more than one event or day.

2–4 days · 2 photographers · video add-on available
How booking works

From inquiry to delivery

The actual order of what happens once you reach out — so you know what to expect at each stage.

01

You reach out

Send your date, location and the package you're considering through the form below, WhatsApp, or call. Replies usually come within a few hours.

02

Date confirmed

Once your date is locked and the package is finalized, you'll get a written confirmation and the booking is held exclusively for you.

03

We shoot your day

Surya and the second shooter arrive ahead of schedule, scout key light and moments, and cover the day with minimal direction needed from you.

04

Full gallery, delivered

The complete edited gallery is delivered within 1 month, as an online link you can view, download, and share.
